title: Working paper on operational concepts (D3.2 from the CDE4Peace project)
author: Nikolay Pavlov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Working paper presents a review of the operational concepts of three EU Common Security and Defence Policy (CSDP) missions: EULEX Kosovo, EUTM Mali and EUBAM Libya. The desk review has been carried out under WP3 (Review) of the CDE4Peace project. The missions have been selected to provide diversity of the operational concepts’ review in terms of mission goals, mandates and geographical locations. The Working paper seeks to extract the main features of the EU operational concepts for a potential application in quantitative research. A method for decomposing and converting operational concepts into quantifiable variables by means of peace indicators is elaborated.
